message:
Running command: # Perfect! RUN_CTS=false will gate/skip the OpenROAD.CTS step
# Update config: remove OPENROAD_CTS_ENABLE (wrong), add RUN_CTS=false
python3 -c "
import json
config_path = '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json'
with open(config_path) as f:
    cfg = json.load(f)
# Remove wrong key
if 'OPENROAD_CTS_ENABLE' in cfg:
    del cfg['OPENROAD_CTS_ENABLE']
# Add correct gating variable
cfg['RUN_CTS'] = False
# Also disable post-CTS resizer (no CTS = no post-CTS)
cfg['RUN_POST_CTS_RESIZER_TIMING'] = False
with open(config_path, 'w') as f:
    json.dump(cfg, f, indent=4)
print('RUN_CTS:', cfg.get('RUN_CTS'))
print('RUN_POST_CTS_RESIZER_TIMING:', cfg.get('RUN_POST_CTS_RESIZER_TIMING'))
"
